js
const Paul = {
  nickname: '猛吃雪糕',
  gender: '男',
  address: '中国·武汉',
  education: '本科/湖北工业大学',
  major: '英语',
  skills: [
    'HTML/CSS/JavaScript',
    'jQuery',
    'Vue',
    'Git',
    'PhotoShop/Illustrator'

  blog: 'https://mop233.github.io',

  description: '知识改变命运，奋斗成就人生'
}
